response:
The case decided first is **Reynolds v. Sims**. 

This is because the context explicitly states:  
*"Reynolds v. Sims, 377 U.S. 533 (1964) was a United States Supreme Court case... The case was brought on behalf of voters in Alabama by M.O. Sims..."*  
and  
*"Criminal law in the Waite Court: ... Reynolds v. United States... Reynolds v. Pegler... Reynolds v. Sims..."*  

These references indicate that **Reynolds v. Sims** was decided earlier than **Selle v. Gibb**, which was decided in 1984.
